name: RAG Simulator
description: Interactive simulator for understanding Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems — built to help PMs and engineers visualize AI retrieval flows.

name: N8n User Research Automation
description: Automated daily user research workflow that scrapes App Store and Play Store reviews, aggregates feedback, and surfaces themes — eliminating manual research bottlenecks.

name: AI-Powered PM Workflow
description: Personal framework integrating Claude AI, Google AI Studio, n8n, and Figma for accelerated product discovery, research synthesis, and prototyping.

name: AI Evaluation Harness
description: Open-source evaluation pipeline for PM task LLM outputs — using LLM-as-a-Judge methodology to benchmark Claude, GPT-4, and Gemini on latency, cost, and accuracy.
